hook: Your job early on is not to entertain nonstop; it is to make the interaction feel easy.
body: People stay engaged when the exchange feels light enough to continue without social strain.

hook: Trying to prove value in every message often creates pressure faster than attraction.
body: Aim for comfort plus intrigue: enough warmth to feel safe, enough personality to feel distinct.

hook: Aim for comfort plus intrigue: enough warmth to feel safe, enough personality to feel distinct.
body: A playful callback to her profile can work better than launching into a high-energy bit with no context.

hook: A playful callback to her profile can work better than launching into a high-energy bit with no context.
body: Use one grounded opener, then pause and let her style of response tell you how fast to move.
